## Severity

Pick one:

- [ ] **P0** — chain or signature integrity broken; receipts cannot be trusted.
- [ ] **P1** — an ADR-defined invariant is violated (e.g. deny-by-default bypassed, redaction integrity lost, canonicalization non-deterministic).
- [ ] **P2** — documentation, developer experience, or non-load-bearing behavior.

## Additional context

Logs, receipts, related issues, or screenshots if applicable.
